description: Hybrid search over live world-events (BM25 on title/summary + ELSER semantic on event_semantic). Returns ranked real-world disruption events (earthquakes, floods, storms, recalls, strikes, port disruptions). Simulated/what-if events are excluded. Used by the Watcher to triage the feed. Inputs: query (free text describing what to look for), size (max events).

configuration.query:
FROM world-events METADATA _score
| WHERE simulated == false AND event_semantic:?query
| EVAL score = _score, lat = ST_Y(location), lon = ST_X(location)
| KEEP id, source, title, summary, event_type, place_name, region, severity_raw, published_at, url, simulated, lat, lon, score
| SORT score DESC, published_at DESC
| LIMIT ?size

query.description: Free-text description of the events to find, e.g. 'flooding at chemical or industrial plants in India'.

size.description: Maximum number of events to return (e.g. 20).
